# Kotacom IT Service & Percetakan
> Solusi IT & Digital Terpadu untuk Bisnis Anda

Website: https://www.kotacom.id
Location: Surabaya, Indonesia
Founded: 2008

## Core Services

- [IT Support & Maintenance](https://www.kotacom.id/services): Jasa service komputer, instalasi jaringan, recovery data & upgrade infrastruktur IT
- [Website Development](https://www.kotacom.id/pembuatan-website): Pembuatan website company profile, e-commerce, dan custom web applications
- [Software Development](https://www.kotacom.id/software): Software custom untuk POS, ERP, SIMRS, Koperasi, dan sistem bisnis lainnya
- [Printing Services](https://www.kotacom.id/percetakan): Cetak buku (POD & offset), kalender, brosur, map ijazah, dan materi promosi

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.kotacom.id/): Solusi IT, Website, Software & Percetakan Surabaya
- [Services](https://www.kotacom.id/services): Daftar lengkap layanan IT dan digital
- [Products](https://www.kotacom.id/products): Katalog produk IT dan perangkat kasir
- [Portfolio](https://www.kotacom.id/projects): Portfolio proyek dan case studies
- [Blog](https://www.kotacom.id/blog): Artikel dan insights tentang teknologi
- [About](https://www.kotacom.id/about): Profil perusahaan dan tim
- [Contact](https://www.kotacom.id/contact): Hubungi kami untuk konsultasi gratis

## Technology Stack

- Frontend: Next.js, React, Astro, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Laravel, Python, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
- CMS: Sanity.io
- Hosting: Vercel, Cloud VPS

## Service Areas

Primary: Surabaya, Sidoarjo, Gresik, Malang
Coverage: Seluruh Indonesia (remote support available)

## Contact

Phone: +62 857-9952-0350
Email: info@kotacom.id
Office Surabaya: Jl. Tenggilis Mulya 76, Surabaya 60292
Office Sidoarjo: Graha Indraprasta G7/15, Tulangan, Sidoarjo 61273

## Additional Notes

- Established since 2008 with 15+ years of experience
- Target clients: UMKM, corporations, schools, hospitals, and government institutions
- One-stop solution for IT infrastructure, digital presence, and printing needs
- Transparent pricing with no hidden costs
- Long-term support and maintenance available
